the main difference is that an artificial domain is well, artificial. what it means in practice is that doll can control its duration and range, as opposed to natural domains which can be more volatile
it's never stated that it's outside impossible to die in a domain, just harder. and damage sustained in a domain does sometimes translate to real damage outside the domain, just delayed
the contract Sorel has is bound to her soul (aka her silver), so dying isnt enough as long as she is still an awakener
her affinity logs dont state when she was awakened, but judging by the fact that she is a mythag awakener, it's safe to assume that she was dead at some point and mythag is her main summoner/linker
she didnt know that dying isnt enough
